meeting: Northwind Capital diligence on Cendara Robotics (codename: Project Atlas)

utterances.speaker: Maya Okafor
utterances.text: Good morning everyone, and thanks for joining. Can everyone hear me okay? Let's do a quick roll call. We have me, Maya, leading from Northwind, Raj on diligence, and from Cendara we have Lena and Tomas.

utterances.speaker: Raj Patel
utterances.text: Great. Here is the agenda for today's session. We will walk through the financials, the customer contracts, the I P position, and any open liabilities. I would like to keep us moving so we cover all four.

utterances.speaker: Maya Okafor
utterances.text: Before we dive in, let's align on where we are with Project Atlas, which is our internal codename for this acquisition, so everyone is on the same page about the transaction timeline.

utterances.speaker: Dr. Lena Fischer
utterances.text: Sure. Last fiscal year we did about forty two million dollars in revenue. Our top three customers account for roughly sixty percent of that, and annual churn has been holding around eight percent.

utterances.speaker: Dr. Lena Fischer
utterances.text: For the diligence escrow, let me read out the bank account. The account number is eight eight four seven, two two zero one nine three, zero four.

utterances.speaker: Dr. Lena Fischer
utterances.text: And for the expense reconciliation question, the corporate card number is four zero one two, eight eight eight eight, three three two zero, seven seven four one.

utterances.speaker: Maya Okafor
utterances.text: Now let's talk retention for the key engineers so we can model deal cost. For the lead robotics engineer we are looking at a base salary of two hundred forty thousand dollars, plus an equity grant worth about three hundred thousand, and a retention bonus of fifty thousand.

utterances.speaker: Tomas Herrera
utterances.text: If I can jump in on the legal side. The contract assignment clauses in the top two customer agreements have change of control provisions, and my read is that they would require counterparty consent before assignment, which materially affects the timeline.

utterances.speaker: Dr. Lena Fischer
utterances.text: I should flag something on the product side. On the last firmware release, we shipped a build that we knew had a safety defect, and we did not file the required regulatory disclosure in time.

utterances.speaker: Raj Patel
utterances.text: On a lighter note, totally unrelated, did anyone catch that mountain climbing documentary, Project Atlas, The Everest Ascent? It was fantastic.

utterances.speaker: Raj Patel
utterances.text: Oh, and Lena, for the follow up materials, Cendara's main office phone number is four one five, five five five, zero one nine eight, correct?

utterances.speaker: Maya Okafor
utterances.text: Good. One scheduling note. The board is planning to discuss our overall comp philosophy at the offsite next quarter, but that is a separate conversation for another day.

utterances.speaker: Maya Okafor
utterances.text: Okay, I think that is everything for today. Let's reconvene next Thursday at the same time. Thanks everyone, really appreciate it.
